scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:frontend && npm run lint:fix:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.docker:restart: npm run docker:down && npm run docker:up
scripts.docker:clean: docker-compose down -v && docker volume rm fitflow_mysql_data 2>nul || echo Volume cleaned
scripts.db:wait: echo Esperando a que MySQL este listo... && timeout /t 35 /nobreak
scripts.db:status: docker exec -it fitflow-mysql mysql -u root -prootpassword123 -e "SHOW DATABASES;" 2>nul || echo MySQL no esta disponible
scripts.db:health: docker inspect --format={{.State.Health.Status}} fitflow-mysql 2>nul || echo Container no encontrado
scripts.db:verify: docker exec -it fitflow-mysql mysql -u devuser -pdevpassword123 -e "SELECT name, email, role FROM fit_flow_db.users;" 2>nul || echo No hay usuarios o base no disponible
scripts.db:verify:count: docker exec -it fitflow-mysql mysql -u devuser -pdevpassword123 -e "SELECT COUNT(*) as total_usuarios FROM fit_flow_db.users;" 2>nul
scripts.db:reset: npm run docker:down:volumes && npm run docker:up && npm run db:wait && npm run db:status
scripts.dev:setup: echo === Setup Inicial de FitFlow === && npm run db:reset && echo === Esperando backend... Inicia en otra terminal: npm run start:backend === && echo === Luego ejecuta: npm run db:seed:users ===
scripts.dev:start: npm run docker:up && npm run db:wait && npm run start:backend
scripts.dev:full: npm run db:reset && echo Inicia backend: npm run start:backend && echo Luego seed: npm run db:seed:users
scripts.dev:backend: npm run docker:up && npm run db:wait && npm run start:backend
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend
scripts.clean:frontend: cd frontend && rmdir /s /q node_modules dist .angular 2>nul || echo Frontend limpio
scripts.clean:backend: cd backend && rmdir /s /q node_modules dist 2>nul || echo Backend limpio
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && npm run docker:clean && echo === Limpieza completa finalizada ===
